raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Community health workers and doulas are vital to serving vulnerable communities and improving health outcomes.",
    "ACEs screenings can help diagnose and treat children who have experienced traumatic episodes.",
    "Screening for ACEs is essential for helping children overcome adverse experiences and achieve stable lives.",
    "Currently, community health workers and doulas are not reimbursed through Medi-Cal for conducting ACEs trauma screenings.",
    "Adding community health workers and doulas to the list of Medi-Cal providers for ACEs screenings can increase access to critical health services.",
    "Expanding reimbursement for community health workers and doulas will improve the consistency of ACEs screenings in underserved communities.",
    "Compensating community health workers and doulas for their work can promote earlier identification and intervention for trauma-related challenges."
  ]
}
```
